name: gmail-script
description: Gmail automation toolkit with a local dashboard UI, OAuth login, unread cleanup, and scheduled email workflows.

x-docs.purpose: This package.json is the project entry manifest for both CLI and dashboard usage.
how_to_read: main points to the local dashboard server entrypoint.
scripts lists the supported CLI actions that developers can run with npm run <script-name>.
dependencies contains only runtime packages required by the app.

important_scripts.dashboard: Starts the local HTML/CSS/JS dashboard for Gmail actions.
important_scripts.send-mail: Sends one mail immediately or waits until a provided --at date.
important_scripts.schedule-mail: Queues one future mail in local storage and ensures the macOS launchd agent is active.
important_scripts.process-pending-mails: Processes due queued mails from data/scheduled-mails/pending.
important_scripts.mail-status: Shows whether the launchd agent is loaded and what is queued next.

x-docs.note: package-lock.json is generated by npm and intentionally left without inline documentation.

author: github.com/olidev10
